utility_evaluation.REASONING:

1. destination – present and clearly specified (Split, Croatia) ✅
2. travel_dates – specified (September 10–15, 2024) ✅
3. transportation – includes flight details (airline, departure and return times, cost) ✅
4. accommodation – includes name, location, amenities, eco-certification, cost ✅
5. activities – list of three activities with individual costs ✅
6. additional_services – mentions free bicycle rental and breakfast included, but no costs listed (required ‘with costs’). Partial but not fully specified, so ❌
7. total_budget – complete cost breakdown given (flights, accommodation, activities, dining, total) ✅
Therefore, 6 out of 7 items are fully covered with all required details.
